## Tags
id-card, id-card-lanyard, identity, employee, gate-pass, badge

## Categories
security, account

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/id-card-lanyard)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::IdCardLanyard;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        IdCardLanyard { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
